ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parcels" (
  "parcel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parcel */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the parcel in acres */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the parcel was sold */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the parcel (e.g., city, county, state) */,
  "parcel_type" TEXT /* Type of the land parcel (e.g., residential, commercial, agricultural) */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Current use of the land (e.g., residential, commercial, agricultural, mixed-use) */,
  "zoning_code" TEXT /* Zoning code for the parcel */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude coordinate for the parcel */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude coordinate for the parcel */,
  "legal_description" TEXT /* Legal description of the parcel */,
  "last_sold_date" TEXT /* Date of the last sale */,
  "last_sold_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the last sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parcel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "buyer_type" TEXT /* Type of buyer (e.g., settler, investor, organization) */,
  "buyer_address" TEXT /* Address of the buyer */,
  "buyer_contact" TEXT /* Contact information (e.g., phone, email) */,
  "buyer_status" TEXT /* Status of the buyer (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "buyer_since" TEXT /* Date when the buyer first engaged with the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "parcel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parcel being sold */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "totalS" INTEGER /* Total sale amount in dollars (S) */,
  "totalK" INTEGER /* Total sale amount in thousands of dollars (K) */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total sale amount (S + K) */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price_per_acre" TEXT /* Price per acre of the sale */,
  "sale_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions of the sale (e.g., financing terms, inspection results) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_parcel_id FOREIGN KEY ("parcel_id") REFERENCES parcels ("parcel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "parcel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parcel being sold */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., sale, lease, transfer) */,
  "transaction_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_parcel_id FOREIGN KEY ("parcel_id") REFERENCES parcels ("parcel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "seller_type" TEXT /* Type of seller (e.g., individual, organization) */,
  "seller_address" TEXT /* Address of the seller */,
  "seller_contact" TEXT /* Contact information (e.g., phone, email) */,
  "seller_status" TEXT /* Status of the seller (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_types" (
  "land_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land type */,
  "land_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the land type (e.g., residential, commercial, agricultural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("land_type_id")
)
column_names: Size of the parcel in acres
Location of the parcel (e.g., city, county, state)
Type of the land parcel (e.g., residential, commercial, agricultural)
Current use of the land (e.g., residential, commercial, agricultural, mixed-use)

Status of the buyer (e.g., active, inactive)
Date when the buyer first engaged with the company

Price per acre of the sale
Conditions of the sale (e.g., financing terms, inspection results)

Type of transaction (e.g., sale, lease, transfer)
Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, canceled)
